name: BRAVE1 Auto-Submit on KPI Score ≥ 4
description: When AuditorSEC Grafana KPI readiness score reaches ≥ 4 (out of 5), automatically prepare and trigger BRAVE1 submission flow

config.description: Receives Grafana alertmanager webhook when KPI threshold is met

filter.description: Only proceed if KPI readiness score is 4 or higher

config.description: Pull current platform metrics for submission evidence
Pull NIS2 compliance status for BRAVE1 requirements
Pull defense-tech audit capabilities for submission

body.text: 🎯 BRAVE1 Auto-Submit Triggered KPI Score: {{step1.kpi_score}} NIS2 Controls: {{step2.controls.length}}/10 Defense Coverage: {{step3.categories.length}} categories Submission package compiled. Review at: https://brave1.gov.ua ⚠️ Manual review recommended before final submission.

config.description: Log submission attempt to tracking sheet

grafana_alert_rule.name: BRAVE1 Readiness Score
grafana_alert_rule.description: Fires when composite KPI score reaches 4.0+
grafana_alert_rule.note: To configure in Grafana: Alerting → Alert Rules → New → set query to /metrics/prometheus auditsec_kpi_score, threshold ≥ 4

setup_instructions.step_1: Create a new Zap in Zapier with trigger: 'Webhooks by Zapier → Catch Hook'
setup_instructions.step_2: Copy the generated webhook URL and paste into grafana_alert_rule.contact_point
setup_instructions.step_3: In Grafana Cloud → Alerting → Contact Points → New → Type: Webhook → URL: <Zapier webhook URL>
setup_instructions.step_4: In Grafana Cloud → Alerting → Alert Rules → New alert rule using auditsec_kpi_score metric
setup_instructions.step_5: Configure Zapier actions: HTTP requests to AuditorSEC API + Telegram notification
